title: Génesis Ramos Rosado
text:
Professional Reviews
Student Advisory Board Member | January 2025 - Present
Journal of Latinx Psychology (JLP) Student Advisory Board


Evaluate JLP’s practices and provide suggestions to uphold an inclusive science that supports equitable content in the Latinx community.
Review manuscripts submitted to JLP and complete evaluations.
Promote JLP as an academic and professional resource.
